### Product Information

- Remove light contamination safely and easily!

- Enhance gloss and slickness

- Safe for use on paint, trim and glass

- Simple spray on wipe off application

- Product Codes: GY-1641, GY-4979

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

100% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 5 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

The Gyeon Quick Detailer helps you safely remove light contamination so your car looks it's best between washings! Even after a detail, light dust, fingerprints, and smudges can find their way on to the paint. With Gyeon Quick Detailer you can remove this type of contamination with only a quick wipe. Quick Detailer can be sprayed directly onto paintwork, trim, glass, etc. It is extremely versatile, coating and wax safe, and enhances gloss and slickness of the surface. You can apply this product to dry paint or even as a drying aid to help your drying towel glide across the paint. When you apply the product you'll be thoroughly impressed with the results. If you are looking for a quick and easy way to clean your paint, while enhancing gloss, the Gyeon Quick Detailer is a great choice!



**Important: This item cannot be shipped, sold, or used in the state of California. CARB in California claims this item breaks their VOC regulations.**

### Videos

#### Gyeon Q M QuickDetailer

![image](https://img.youtube.com/vi/DDy1M57oyRo/hqdefault.jpg)

### From The Label

#### Product Description

Provides deep gloss and a shiny finish. Stunningly easy to work with.


**


- Slick finish

- High gloss and depth

- Safe on all surfaces
**


#### Directions

Wash the car with the shampoo of your choice and dry it. Spray directly on the surface and wipe with a Gyeon microfibre of your choice until full gloss. Possible use as a drying aid on wet panels.

** KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. **

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Robert H. on 7/8/2022

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

One of the better quick detailers that I've used. Great shine and gloss. I'll most likely buy again, although the price is higher than some similar products so not too great of a value.

Reviewed by Daniel M. on 7/4/2021

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Yes I would buy this again, but compared to other detailers on the market this is just ok. For the price point and volume it comes with you can buy a better quality spray such as Sonax or Tacc System. This product is more hype than quality so I would suggest doing your research

Reviewed by Brian C. on 4/26/2021

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Super gloss,slickness,easy to apply no streaking
